# Test video URLs for YouTube summarization integration testing
# Use these URLs to test the YouTube summarization functionality
# Note: Some videos may not have transcripts available

# Public videos with transcripts (manual)
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ

# Public videos with auto-generated transcripts
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jNQXAC9IVRw

# Short video for quick testing
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=L_jWHffIx5E

# Note: Videos change availability over time. If a test fails,
# try using a different public YouTube video with captions enabled.
